Metrics

Legs:4.60 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2010 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: December 24th, 2010 (Wide), released as Gulliver's Travels (Nigeria)
Video Release: April 19th, 2011 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for brief rude humor, mild language and action.
(Rating bulletin 2148, 11/24/2010)
Running Time: 87 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Visual Effects
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion
Plot point: Delayed Adulthood, Kidnap, Relationship Advice, Rescue, Robot, Romance, Royalty, War, Writing and Writers
Source material: Modern Adaptation
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Time period setting: Steampunk
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Davis Entertainment, Dune Entertainment, Ingenious Media, Big Screen Prods, Phoenix Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
